sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114681" key="xrhsmw|do/lhros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρησμῳδ-όληρος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n114681.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">oracular nonsense,</tr_> cj. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χρηισμοδέληρος</foreign> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:13D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
